title: Mine Mine no Mi Dub Pack
description: Mine Mine no Mi english translations based on several dubs
body: # **Starting with Mine Mine no Mi 1.20.1-0.11.0 this datapack is now packaged with the mod itself as an optional datapack. As such this project is now archived and will no longer receive updates!** A resource pack intended to replace Japanese based names from the Mine Mine no Mi mod with English alternatives used in english translated manga and in english dubs. # Installation 1. Download the zip file 2. Drop it in the resourcepacks folder found inside your .minecraft folder, if the folder does not exist you should create it 3. After starting the game go in Options > Resource Packs and enable the resource pack by moving it to the right column 4. Click Done and enjoy # Examples - Mera Mera no Mi → Flame-Flame Fruit - Kage Kage no Mi → Shadow-Shadow Fruit - Hiken → Fire Fist - Shi Shishi Sonson → Death Lion Song - Geppo → Moonwalk
